untranslatable_reason: Broadening Wedges Ascending pattern requires recognition of expanding price range with converging/diverging trendlines and analysis of breakout success rates based on price move magnitude. These geometric relationships (trendline slopes, range expansion rate, and breakout magnitude dependencies) cannot be fully expressed with available point-in-time indicators. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT provide no guidance. Pattern identification itself (the broadening wedge structure) is not directly measurable by single-bar indicators.
